---
title: "Collecting Listening Data with Apple Music"
date: "02-22-2026"
format: html
---

# Exporting Apple Music Title Data

*This requires a mac of some type.*

## Open Apple Music

Create a new playlist with the songs or album you want data from.

![](images/ghost%20-%20step%201.png){width="363"}

## Export to Text File

![](images/ghost%20-%20step%202.png){width="363"} ![](images/ghost%20-%20step%203.png){width="363"} ![](images/ghost%20-%20step%205.png){width="363"} ![](images/ghost%20-%20step%206.png){width="363"} \# Analysis of apple music with R

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(knitr)
library(moderndive)

ghost <- read_tsv("skeleta.txt")

ghost |> 
  head()

```

## Listen Count

```{r}

ggplot(data=ghost, aes(x=`Time`/60,y=`Plays`,color=`Name`)) +
  geom_point(size=3) +
  geom_smooth(method="lm", se=FALSE, color="black") +
  theme_minimal()
```
```{r}
ghost <- ghost |> 
  mutate(minutes=`Time`/60)

ghost_mod <- lm(Plays ~ minutes, data=ghost) 
ghost_mod |> 
  get_regression_table()

ghost_mod |> 
  get_regression_summaries() 

```
